---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div id="site-header">
<img src="LOGO-lockup.png" alt="Dog Capital" style="height: 36px; width: auto; display: block; margin: 0;">
<p>Systematic Strategies for Argentine Investors.</p>
<p>Rules-based — Evidence-driven — Transparently-tracked</p>
</div>

<div id="site-nav">
<a href="index.qmd#programs">Active Strategies</a>
</div>

<div id="programs" style="padding: 4rem 0 2rem 0;">

### Active Strategies

<div class="program-grid">

<div class="program-card">
<span class="tag">Paper Trading</span>
<span class="tag">Interactive Brokers</span>

### ES Core — Futures

The core research strategy — S&P500 futures core with a dynamic tactical sleeve. Executed as Futures on CME.

<div class="stats-group-label">Paper Results Overview</div>
<div class="card-stats">
<div><div class="stat-label">CAGR</div><div class="stat-value">Populating</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Sharpe</div><div class="stat-value">Populating</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Max DD</div><div class="stat-value">Populating</div></div>
</div>

<div class="backtest-ref">Backtest CAGR 9.80% · 04-09-2001 to 03-07-2026</div>

[View research →](programs/es-core.qmd)

</div>

<div class="program-card">
<span class="tag live">Live Trading</span>
<span class="tag">Invertir Online</span>

### SPY Core — ETFs

U.S. large-cap ETF as a permanent equity core with a dynamic tactical sleeve. Executed as CEDEARs on BYMA.

<div class="stats-group-label">Live Results Overview</div>
<div class="card-stats">
<div><div class="stat-label">CAGR</div><div class="stat-value">Populating</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Sharpe</div><div class="stat-value">Populating</div></div>
<div><div class="stat-label">Max DD</div><div class="stat-value">Populating</div></div>
</div>

<div class="backtest-ref">Backtest CAGR 11.68% · 04-09-2001 to 02-07-2026</div>

[View research →](programs/spy-core.qmd)

</div>

</div>

</div>

<div id="site-footer">
&copy; 2026 Dog Capital &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Buenos Aires
</div>
